title: Everyone Will Have an AI Coding Agent
abstract: Everyone Will Have an AI Coding Agent is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and it handles the execution. Boost your ...
abstract_zh: “ Everyone Will Have an AI Coding Agent”就像是你的私人编程小助手，设定目标它自己去搞掂！比如你只想说：“今天做个网页”，然后它自动规划、调用工具、执行多步骤流程。剩下的你就等着收获成果吧！一键启动，解放双手，从此告别代码泥潭！
